title: Lume's World
description: mobs can break blocks, theres gravity, and theres the create mod (and theres also VR)
body:
(Description is for N21.1.0, and will be published before release.)
Welcome to Lume's World! If you want to survive, here's some helpful information:

🕯️ The day/night cycle takes a full 30 minutes instead of 20. This means each day and each night last 15 minutes. 

🕯️ The Overworld generates in a much more varied way, and the Nether and the End have both been removed. 

🕯️ Hunger no longer exists. Instead, food will heal you. 

🕯️ Progression is mostly as it is in Vanilla, however the Create mod and Farmer's Delight is included along with some add-ons. 

🕯️ Once night falls, you'll have to deal with mobs. Zombies can break blocks wooden or weaker, creepers will explode just to damage your base, and spiders can crawl around just about anything and look horrifying. Skeletons haven't changed, and yet somehow are still equally as significant. 

🕯️ Blocks and liquids have gravity. Weight is now a factor, and infinite water sources are long gone. Experiment from there. Even if you manage to engineer a big skyscraper, however, phantoms will spawn at high y-levels. 

🕯️ Also, saplings with root by themselves. I think that's probably the most significant change. 

🕯️ Oh and also this is extremely optimised for VR, and has convenient Twitch chat integration via /twitch connect [channel]
